name: node-nopt
title: node-nopt
description:
Command-line option parser for Node.js
Full featured option parser, with support for :
* types (String, path, url, Number, Date, Boolean, NaN, Stream, Array)
* error handling
* abbreviations
* shorthands
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side javascript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-nopt because Command-line option parser for Node.js.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-nopt as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-nopt with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-nopt --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
